positive: Stylized cinematic illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. Central composition featuring giant bioluminescent mushrooms and twisted, ethereal trees with glowing vines. The ground is covered in soft, glowing mist and crystalline flora. The sky is a deep gradient blend of sapphire, lavender, and gold, creating high contrast with the warm, cool glow emanating from the forest elements. Focus on silhouettes and clean, graphic lines for maximal print readability. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau, Japanese Ukiyo-e influence, clean vector aesthetic, highly saturated, detailed, symmetrical composition.
negative: photorealistic, blur, low resolution, signature, text, watermark, artifact, dirty, noisy, cropped, multiple limbs, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, cartoonish, messy, grain, oversaturated
